description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular cardboard box with a natural brown, recycled paper appearance and printed graphics on all sides. The front features a prominent label reading 'Spagetti yarn' and 'DIY', along with illustrations of yarn, knitting needles, and a hand holding yarn. The box has a tuck-in top flap with a die-cut handle for easy carrying, and the sides display additional illustrations and product information, including a teddy bear and scissors. The back is covered with text, likely instructions or product details, and includes recycling symbols and a QR code. The overall design is eco-friendly and visually appealing, with a matte finish and hand-drawn style graphics.
description: A brown cardboard box with printed yarn-themed graphics, a tuck-in flap, and a die-cut handle, designed for carrying and storing craft supplies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label 'Spagetti yarn', DIY badge, and hand-drawn yarn illustrations.
description_view_1: Side view with the box partially open, displaying illustrated instructions and a teddy bear graphic.
description_view_2: Back view featuring dense printed text, recycling symbols, and a QR code.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the box open, showing a list of contents, scissors illustration, and more yarn graphics.
